articles.title: Listen to F1 Nation's Chinese GP review
articles.summary: Listen to F1 Nation's Chinese GP review. Kimi Antonelli took his maiden Grand Prix victory in China, becoming the second-youngest F1 race winner after Max Verstappen as Mercedes bagged another 1-2 to keep their 2026 season win streak intact.

articles.title: 6 moments you missed at the Chinese Grand Prix
articles.summary: 6 moments you missed at the Chinese Grand Prix. Relive the action from the Sprint weekend at the 2026 Chinese Grand Prix with plenty of off-track Formula 1 moments – podium celebrations, fan gifts, and more.

articles.title: 6 Winners and 5 Losers from China
articles.summary: 6 Winners and 5 Losers from China. F1.com's Lawrence Barretto picks out his winners and losers from the first Sprint weekend of the 2026 F1 season.

articles.title: Vasseur praises Hamilton and Leclerc for 'professional' Ferrari battle
articles.summary: Vasseur praises Hamilton and Leclerc for 'professional' Ferrari battle. Ferrari Team Principal Fred Vasseur has praised drivers Lewis Hamilton and Charles Leclerc for their "professional" fight in the Chinese Grand Prix, adding such battles are "the best way to build up a team".

articles.title: Hamilton overjoyed to share China podium with 'whole family'
articles.summary: Hamilton overjoyed to share China podium with 'whole family'. Lewis Hamilton grabbed his first podium for Ferrari in China, but his P3 finish was made even more special by the fact he shared the rostrum with his former team mate George Russell, the man who replaced him at Mercedes Kimi Antonelli – a...

articles.title: Silverstone completes 2026 music bill
articles.summary: Silverstone completes 2026 music bill. Silverstone have completed the music line-up for the Formula 1 Pirelli British Grand Prix 2026, with Richard Ashcroft, Chase & Status and Rag’n’Bone Man joining David Guetta.

articles.title: Ocon 'deserved penalty' as Haas driver apologises to Colapinto
articles.summary: Ocon 'deserved penalty' as Haas driver apologises to Colapinto. Esteban Ocon admits he "deserved the penalty" for his clash with Franco Colapinto during the Chinese Grand Prix and apologised to the Alpine driver post-race.

articles.title: Points for Williams in China like a 'mini victory for us' – Sainz
articles.summary: Points for Williams in China like a 'mini victory for us' – Sainz. Carlos Sainz believes a points finish in the Chinese Grand Prix last weekend was like a "mini victory for us" as Williams continue struggle for performance at the start of the 2026 season.

articles.title: Stella reacts to ‘disappointing’ double McLaren DNS in China
articles.summary: Stella reacts to ‘disappointing’ double McLaren DNS in China. McLaren Team Principal Andrea Stella was left to watch the Chinese Grand Prix from the sidelines with both his drivers, with neither McLaren car able to start the race. He called it a “disappointing day,” and it is easy to see why, with O...

articles.title: 'F1 The Movie' wins Oscar for ‘Best Sound’
articles.summary: 'F1 The Movie' wins Oscar for ‘Best Sound’. F1 The Movie has won an Academy Award for 'Best Sound' having been nominated in four different categories.

articles.title: Alonso ‘struggling to feel hands and feet’ before Chinese GP retirement
articles.summary: Alonso ‘struggling to feel hands and feet’ before Chinese GP retirement. Fernando Alonso says he was struggling to feel his hands and his feet for a spell of the Chinese Grand Prix before retiring his Aston Martin due to excessive vibrations.Aston Martin and Honda have been working to reduce the imp...

articles.title: Verstappen blasts new F1 rules again, dismisses positive fan reactions
articles.summary: Verstappen blasts new F1 rules again, dismisses positive fan reactions. Max Verstappen says those who like the 2026 races in Formula 1 “don’t know what racing is about” and fired a warning to the sport’s owners after retiring from the Chinese Grand Prix.

articles.title: Antonelli and Hamilton’s shared firsts hint at bright futures
articles.summary: Antonelli and Hamilton’s shared firsts hint at bright futures. While Kimi Antonelli enjoyed his first F1 win, the man he replaced marked a first of his own.

articles.title: Emotional Antonelli ends 20-year wait for Italian F1 winner
articles.summary: Emotional Antonelli ends 20-year wait for Italian F1 winner. Kimi Antonelli was on the verge of tears after becoming F1's newest winner – and the first from Italy since Giancarlo Fisichella in 2006.

articles.title: McLaren failed to make Chinese GP after separate power unit issues
articles.summary: McLaren failed to make Chinese GP after separate power unit issues. Unrelated issues on the same Mercedes power unit component meant McLaren's Chinese Grand Prix ended before it started.

articles.title: Antonelli claims first grand prix win in China
articles.summary: Antonelli claims first grand prix win in China. Kimi Antonelli led a Mercedes 1-2 as he claimed his first F1 win in Shanghai.

articles.title: Formula 1 officially postpones Bahrain and Saudi races
articles.summary: Formula 1 officially postpones Bahrain and Saudi races. The fourth and fifth rounds of the 2026 championship were due to take place on April 12 and 19 respectively.

articles.title: Antonelli checks off an inevitable record as youngest F1 polesitter
articles.summary: Antonelli checks off an inevitable record as youngest F1 polesitter. A first career pole for Kimi Antonelli before he turns 20 comes as no surprise, now a first win awaits.

articles.title: Russell feared P10 start after issues hampered Chinese Grand Prix qualifying
articles.summary: Russell feared P10 start after issues hampered Chinese Grand Prix qualifying. George Russell will start the Chinese Grand Prix from the front row, but he thought he might have to be further back after car problems in Q3.

articles.title: ‘The car is completely undriveable’ - Verstappen struggles to make a mark in China
articles.summary: ‘The car is completely undriveable’ - Verstappen struggles to make a mark in China. Red Bull appears to have fallen further down the order in Shanghai.

articles.title: 'Best racing ever' or 'a joke'? The row over the new F1
articles.summary: 'Best racing ever' or 'a joke'? The row over the new F1. Have F1's new rules produced a "battery world championship" or "the best racing ever"? Lewis Hamilton, Max Verstappen and Fernando Alonso sum up the paradox at the heart of the sport.

articles.title: Ferrari's Hamilton 'has mojo back' - driver ratings
articles.summary: Ferrari's Hamilton 'has mojo back' - driver ratings. BBC Radio 5 Live F1 commentator Harry Benjamin rates how the drivers performed during the Chinese Grand Prix.

articles.title: Teen Antonelli wins in China as McLarens fail to start
articles.summary: Teen Antonelli wins in China as McLarens fail to start. Kimi Antonelli takes his first Formula 1 victory in leading team-mate George Russell to a Mercedes one-two in the Chinese Grand Prix.

articles.title: Antonelli celebrations 'lovely to see' - Benson
articles.summary: Antonelli celebrations 'lovely to see' - Benson. On the latest episode of the The Chequered Flag Podcast, pundits Andrew Benson and Sam Bird say Kimi Antonelli's Chinese Grand Prix win at 19 years old "is as big as it comes" for a young driver, after the Italian was moved to tears following his win.

articles.title: F1 cancels Bahrain & Saudi Arabia Grands Prix
articles.summary: F1 cancels Bahrain & Saudi Arabia Grands Prix. The Bahrain and Saudi Arabian Grand Prix weekends are cancelled because of the ongoing conflict in the Middle East.

articles.title: Andrew Benson Q&A: Send us your questions
articles.summary: Andrew Benson Q&A: Send us your questions. Our F1 correspondent Andrew Benson is doing a weekly Q&A this season, so get your questions in now.

articles.title: 'He's back again' - Ferrari's Hamilton praised after Chinese GP
articles.summary: 'He's back again' - Ferrari's Hamilton praised after Chinese GP. On the latest episode of The Chequered Flag podcast, Sam Bird believes Lewis Hamilton's spark "is back" again after the British driver finished in third at the Chinese Grand Prix.

articles.title: Bahrain and Saudi Arabia cancellations helpful for F1 teams - Bird
articles.summary: Bahrain and Saudi Arabia cancellations helpful for F1 teams - Bird. articles.title: 'The tide is turning back towards Hamilton' - Priestley
articles.summary: 'The tide is turning back towards Hamilton' - Priestley. The Chequered Podcast's Harry Benjamin, Jennie Gow and Marc Priestly discuss Lewis Hamilton's strong performance in the Australian Grand Prix, plus his 'upbeat, positive' mood over race weekend.

articles.title: Mercedes 'hit ground running' with new F1 car regulations
articles.summary: Mercedes 'hit ground running' with new F1 car regulations. On the latest episode of The Chequered Flag Podcast, former McLaren mechanic Marc Priestly credits Mercedes for the way they have managed to "hit the ground running" on integrating new F1 car regulations.
